summary: Tested Phase A+B (Account & Security page + mobile responsive) end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 pytest passing for /api/auth preferences, profile, change-password, delete-account (incl. admin-cannot-self-delete and 401 auth-required). Frontend: Account page full flow (profile save, change-password disabled logic + success + old-pw rejection, prefs toggles persisted via API, delete flow logs out and redirects to /login). Mobile responsive verified: hamburger visible <768px, sidebar starts off-screen (x=-240), opens on toggle (x=0) with overlay, closes on overlay click AND on nav item click; on desktop hamburger hidden. Admin regression (login+dashboard) and public marketing routes (/security, /privacy-telemetry, /changelog, /pricing all 200) OK.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: /preferences PUT does not merge with existing user prefs — it fully replaces via model_dump(). Since PreferencesInput requires all fields, front-end always sends full object, so this is fine now, but if partial updates are ever needed a $set on nested fields would be safer.
Account.jsx: 'language' preference is fetched but never editable in the UI — the language card only mentions LOCAL ONLY + Email alerts. Minor UX gap; not a functional bug.
Layout.jsx: nav-account uses `truncate` correctly but on very narrow viewports (<340px) the email may be heavily clipped — acceptable.
auth.py delete-account: cascade deletes by user_id string — good coverage; consider also revoking any active refresh_tokens if a blacklist collection is later added.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@boostpc.io / 4zWK4o_xSw5prU-2b7w9dQ. Throwaway users created dynamically per test (test_<hex>@test.io / pw123456).
seed_data_creation: None (throwaway users self-clean via delete-account test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_account_endpoints.py covers all new /api/auth account endpoints + admin protection + auth-required. Run with: pytest backend/tests/test_account_endpoints.py -v. Playwright flow for /app/account uses the following testids: account-page, account-name-input, account-save-profile, account-current-pwd, account-new-pwd, account-change-pwd-btn, account-localonly-toggle, account-emailalerts-toggle, account-delete-btn, account-delete-pwd, account-delete-confirm-btn. Mobile testids: sidebar, sidebar-toggle, sidebar-overlay, nav-account.
